nl_query: Count active script assignments per evaluator.
failed_sql:
SELECT fa.id AS evaluator_user_id, au.display_name, COUNT(sa.id) AS active_assignments
FROM faculty_cache fa
JOIN app_user au ON au.employee_id = fa.id
JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.faculty_cache_id = fa.id
WHERE sa.is_active = TRUE
GROUP BY fa.id, au.display_name
ORDER BY active_assignments DESC
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): app_user.employee_erp_id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
